posts.text:
Republicans in Congress know they’re in deep trouble for the midterms unless they can rig the rules.

Donald Trump even said that passing the “SAVE” Act will “guarantee the midterms.”

Don’t be fooled: the “SAVE” Act is their way to keep American citizens from voting.

Giant corporations, including Amazon and Microsoft, have earned record-breaking profits and gotten massive tax breaks from the Trump administration.

So why are they laying off thousands of workers? This looks like another example of unchecked corporate greed.
Reminder: Working families are losing the help they depend on to afford groceries and doctors' visits while Trump spends your tax dollars on an illegal war.

I’m proud to endorse @ZachWahls for the U.S. Senate in Iowa. Zach's got a bold and inspiring vision: ban congressional stock trading, raise the minimum wage, and make child care affordable. We need new leaders like him to make our economy work for working families.


Zach Wahls (@ZachWahls)

No one knows better than Senator @ewarren how to fight back against corporate monopolies, Wall Street Banks, and out-of-control billionaires. I’m proud to have her support for our campaign to take back Iowa,

Graham Platner's got the grit to fight for what’s right on behalf of Maine’s working families—not billionaires and giant corporations.

He’s inspired a grassroots movement to flip Maine, and I’m thrilled to endorse @grahamformaine for Senate.


Graham Platner for Senate (@grahamformaine)

🚨Endorsement Alert! 🚨 

“People are excited to vote for someone who will actually fight for them. Not just nibble around the edges.” 

Thank you, Senator Warren. Together I look forward to taking on Wall Street

Congratulations, @DanielBiss, on winning Illinois’ 9th District Democratic House primary!

Daniel is the fighter we need in Congress to take on giant corporations and lower health care and housing costs.

The Paramount-Warner Bros. deal includes $24 billion in Middle Eastern investments, but the Trump administration is avoiding a serious review of the potential national security risks.

Unsurprising, given the cloud of corruption surrounding Trump and this deal from the start.

Instead of changing their unpopular policies, Trump and the Congressional Republicans have decided to try to keep as many Americans from voting as possible.

That's what the “SAVE” Act is about. And you better believe the Democrats are going to fight it all the way.

newrepublic.com/post/207593/…

Today I'm endorsing @MalloryMcMorrow for U.S. Senate!

I first got to know Mallory back in 2018 when she flipped a Republican-held seat. I know that she's got energy, ideas, and fight.

She’s the champion that working families in Michigan need.


Team McMorrow (@TeamMcMorrow)

BREAKING: Senator Elizabeth Warren has officially endorsed Mallory McMorrow for U.S. Senate. Welcome to the team, Senator!





— https://nitter.net/TeamMcMorrow/status/2034235582331621457#m

Double woo-hoo for @JulianaStratton’s big win tonight in Illinois!

Juliana is a true fighter for working families—not corporate interests.

Video

A tsunami of corruption is sweeping through Washington.

The Trump administration makes decisions based on how much they can enrich the wealthy and well-connected.

We must act before our global standing craters, our economy falters, and Americans pay for this for generations to come.

Amazon paid $40 million for the rights to the Melania documentary.

$28 million goes directly to Melania Trump.

Meanwhile, Amazon and Jeff Bezos have huge financial stakes in decisions pending before the Trump administration.

This reeks of a corrupt pay-to-play arrangement.

Ticketmaster and Live Nation executives bragged they’re “robbing music fans blind.”

So naturally, the Trump administration let them off the hook with a paltry fine that amounts to less than 1 percent of Live Nation’s revenue.


More Perfect Union (@MorePerfectUS)

Internal messages from Live Nation reveal two execs talking about "robbing [fans] blind."

“These people are so stupid. I almost feel bad taking advantage of them," one says.

That man is now the head of ticketing for the unit respons

Happy primary election day, Illinois!

I'm proud to have endorsed @JulianaStratton, @JunaidforUs, @RobertJPeters, and @DanielBiss in their races today. They will fight to take on corruption and lower costs for families.

Find your polling place at iwillvote.com/

ABC, Meta, X, and Paramount promised as much as $63 million in donations to Trump's future Presidential Library.

But now the Library Fund is dissolved, leaving the American people in the dark on the fate of millions of dollars.

Where did that money go? I’m pushing for answers.
they're scared that we would be just as if not more badass
had to read this for my high school english exams almost 20 years ago. still my favourite book all these years later. It really made you put yourself in the shoes of others
Dear Santa for Xmas I would like....... 😍😍😍
They want to kill us. We have to resist
Probably not I fully expect to be shot in the street when Trump declares a trans genocide
Elon shitting his panties rn ong
people, please.... I am not Elizabeth warren the senator. why would she have the amazing Shia LaBeouf as her pfp? I was however, named after her by my mother 🥰
this is my actual name you fucking nazi
Honestly, at this point, we should just replace moderators with a mic and a timer. Let’s see who can roast their opponent into submission before they even get to their argument. 🥴

as Democrats we must resist the temptation of digital distractions on X (or whatever it’s calling itself today) 📱. Our time is best spent uniting against the tide of fascism 🦸‍♂️✊, not squabbling over algorithms. Let’s stay grounded, organized, and relentlessly committed to a better future #StayFocused
haha you would think that but its actually an honor 🥰

Trump & Musk’s X are a threat to democracy & trans safety. 🚨 Musk’s free speech absolutism fuels hate, making transphobia mainstream. 🧨 We can't let platforms amplify lies & harm. It's time to fight for a future where everyone is safe & heard. 🌈✊  #DefendDemocracy  #TransLivesMatter #MuskIsDangerous
THIS could cause "economic destruction."
What is going on with Warner Brothers? I'm here to explain.
Hate Ticketmaster?
Donald Trump can't spare the money for millions of Americans to get health care, but he'll spend a billion dollars a day bombing Iran.
No war with Iran.
Who is Donald Trump’s America “golden” for?
Who would win the tax dodging Olympics?
Filing your taxes should be easy and FREE.
Why is Trump suing his own IRS?!
Donald Trump gave Amazon HOW MUCH money?!
